creator: nemysis@gmx.ch
text:
On Site is new Source release 3.1.2 for Cairo-Dock

https://launchpad.net/cairo-dock

Cairo-Dock 3.1.2 (bug-fix version) has just been released!


This is a bug-fix release. Here is the list of changes:

https://launchpad.net/cairo-dock/+announcement/10913

http://glx-dock.org/bg_topic.php?t=6605


On Site is new Source release 3.1.2 for Cairo-Dock Plugins

https://launchpad.net/cairo-dock-plug-ins


And here are Source Releases

for Cairo-Dock

https://launchpad.net/cairo-dock-core/3.1/3.1.2/+download/cairo-dock-3.1.2.tar.gz

for Cairo-Dock Plugins

https://launchpad.net/cairo-dock-plug-ins/3.1/3.1.2/+download/cairo-dock-plugins-3.1.2.tar.gz


Please update these Ports which are old bug Versions 2.3.0~3 to bug-fix release 3.1.2.

How-To-Repeat: Please update the obsolete, with bugs version to the latest release, bug-fix version.
